properties.entry: DELETE FROM BQSalesforceEntity WHERE BQSalesforceEntity.fields ->> :fieldKey = :fieldValue AND BQSalesforceEntity.type = :type
UPDATE BQSalesforceEntity SET fields = :fields WHERE BQSalesforceEntity.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND BQSalesforceEntity.id = :id AND BQSalesforceEntity.type = :type
